title: alsine rosani var. dalmatica
intro: Alsine rosani var. dalmatica, also known as Dalmatian penny-cress, is a plant species in the family Brassicaceae that is native to the Dalmatia region in Croatia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and diuretic effects, which have been utilized to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Alsine rosani var. dalmatica include its ability to help alleviate congestion, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
